quiz.question:
In chess, beginners see a check and they play it. 

Is Re1+ a good idea, or do you just waste time?

answers.text: Re1+ is the best move because it either forces …Be6 or …Kf8.

feedback.text: Exactly! Black has to either lose the c6-pawn or lose the castling rights, which is bad for the development.

distractors.text: Re1+ isn’t the best move because …Be6 or …Kf8 are moves that don’t hurt Black at all.

feedback.text: Try to evaluate all of Black's responses to Re1+.  Which are the forced moves? And could we win some material after Black's response?
